subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! The ocean of Thy mercy hath surged, and the winds from the realm of Thy spirituality have stirred. The orb of forgiveness hath dawned forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی قد ماج طمطام رحمانیتک و هاج اریاح شطر روحانیتک قد اشرق نیر الغفران
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for forgiveness
